title: Exact dates
wikitext:
[]: Exact dates             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Dec 05, 2004 11:20 pm Alright, alright, I searched through the forum archieve but couldn't find this question, though I don't doubt it's been asked before here. What is the exact date of both Second and Third Impact? And I'm not talking just year and month, that you can see in EOE, I wanna' know the exact date on which it happened. Is it written anywhere? Is there some point in the series where it's mentioned/listed, or what about the numerous books about Eva? Anything there? I've heard that some of the staff and VA's from ADV (Tiffany Grant for one) as well as the original Japanese GAINAX staff recieved cards from fans wishing them a happy Second Impact when the day rolled around . Just want to know for...y'know, future reference =3 Thanks again.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 05, 2004 11:26 pm 2I - 9/13/2000 3I - Forget about it. The show can't even decide whether it occurs in 2015 or 2016.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Mon Dec 06, 2004 10:21 am well shoot I guess It would have been almost a year since Shinji moved to Tokyo-3, but c'mon. arrrrrrg. I won't give up, if there isn't an actual, documented date than there must be one that has at least come up in discussion, isn't there? phooey. Thanks anyway Reichu, you da' man. ^^;;

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 06, 2004 11:16 am I once figured that if you looked at the calender in Episode 9, and that the production actually checked what the calender days would be in 2015, that the events at that point would be in the winter. So in theory, the whole show takes place in the span of something like August to December 2015. Although I can't say for certain if thats accurate. I think thats also where the idea that Kaworu is actually 15 came from, because the calender date for the battle with Israfel falls after the date of Second Impact, and he's introduced well after that.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Dec 17, 2004 6:06 pm i know of a site that has a countdown to third impact and it occurs in 2016. what date i have yet to get around to figuring out yet, but if you think that i am too lazy i can just give you the address right now.[url]http://naru.easynetonline.net/asukanote/an/site/english/index.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Dec 18, 2004 7:49 am I'm a little confused how she determined the date for third impact :? IMO there is no definite way to determine that date, as the series doesn't really tell us.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Dec 18, 2004 3:42 pm I don't know how Axel did it but maybe he acually did get the date somehow or maybe he just guessed? I don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Jan 08, 2005 12:17 pm new revolation, the date of 3I is sometime in 2015 afterall. If you look at Maya's cpu when she analyzes the Anti At Field, their are 2 dates on it. one part of the screen is filled with data from 2I and the other side of the screen is filled with current data and says 2015 on the top. Yet that would mean that 2I was caused by an anti at field emmitted by Adam.
